title: Unpumpkined
description: This texture pack removes the pumpkin overlay from the screen, allowing you to wear a carved pumpkin without obstructing your view. It keeps the item’s full functionality while giving you a clear, unobstructed visual experience.
body:
```
 _   _                                   _    _                _ 
| | | |_ __  _ __  _   _ _ __ ___  _ __ | | _(_)_ __   ___  __| |
| | | | '_ \| '_ \| | | | '_ ` _ \| '_ \| |/ / | '_ \ / _ \/ _` |
| |_| | | | | |_) | |_| | | | | | | |_) |   <| | | | |  __/ (_| |
 \___/|_| |_| .__/ \__,_|_| |_| |_| .__/|_|\_\_|_| |_|\___|\__,_|
            |_|                   |_|                            
```

**Unpumpkined** is a lightweight texture pack that removes the carved pumpkin overlay from your screen when wearing a pumpkin on your head.

##  Features

**No more obstructed view** — enjoy a clear screen while keeping the pumpkin equipped.

**Full functionality preserved** — Endermen still won’t aggro.
**
No extra changes** — the pack modifies only the overlay, nothing else.

## 🎮 **Perfect for**

Players who want practicality without sacrificing visibility.
